title: free-exercise-db — base d'exercices open source
authors: yuhonas et contributeurs ; données originales de Ollie Jennings (exercises.json)
notes_fr: Ossature des 873 exercices (nom, force, niveau, mécanique, équipement, muscles, instructions EN, images). Restructuré à partir du jeu de données exercises.json.

title: Dose-response relationship between weekly resistance training volume and increases in muscle mass: A systematic review and meta-analysis
authors: Schoenfeld BJ, Ogborn D, Krieger JW
notes_fr: Journal of Sports Sciences. Relation dose-réponse volume → hypertrophie : 10+ séries/muscle/semaine > 5–9 > <5.

title: Effects of Resistance Training Frequency on Measures of Muscle Hypertrophy: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
authors: Schoenfeld BJ, Ogborn D, Krieger JW
notes_fr: Sports Medicine 46:1689-1697. À volume égal, 2 séances/muscle/semaine ≥ 1 séance.

title: Loading Recommendations for Muscle Strength, Hypertrophy, and Local Endurance: A Re-Examination of the Repetition Continuum
authors: Schoenfeld BJ, Grgic J, Van Every DW, Plotkin DL
notes_fr: Sports 9(2):32. L'hypertrophie survient sur un large spectre de charges si l'effort est proche de l'échec ; la force reste spécifique aux charges lourdes.

title: Effects of Rest Interval Duration in Resistance Training on Measures of Muscular Strength: A Systematic Review
authors: Grgic J, Schoenfeld BJ, Skrepnik M, Davies TB, Mikulic P
notes_fr: Sports Medicine. Repos longs (≥2–3 min) préférables pour la force ; 60 s–3 min viables pour l'hypertrophie (Grgic et al. 2017).

title: Application of the Repetitions in Reserve-Based Rating of Perceived Exertion Scale for Resistance Training
authors: Helms ER, Cronin J, Storey A, Zourdos MC
notes_fr: Strength and Conditioning Journal. Échelle RIR/RPE pour autoréguler l'effort : RPE 10 = échec (0 rep en réserve), RPE 8 = 2 reps en réserve.

title: American College of Sports Medicine Position Stand: Progression Models in Resistance Training for Healthy Adults
notes_fr: Medicine & Science in Sports & Exercise 41(3):687-708. Recommandations officielles : surcharge progressive, ordre des exercices, charges selon l'objectif.

title: Training Volume Landmarks for Muscle Growth (MV / MEV / MAV / MRV)
authors: Renaissance Periodization — Israetel M et al.
notes_fr: Modèle de repères de volume hebdomadaire par muscle (consensus de coachs, valeurs indicatives à individualiser).

title: Essentials of Strength Training and Conditioning (4e édition)
authors: Haff GG, Triplett NT (éd.) — National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA)
notes_fr: Ouvrage de référence de la NSCA : technique, programmation, physiologie de l'entraînement.
